title: Aa fiebrigii

Aa fiebrigii is typically classified as a member of the subfamily Vanilloideae. The species Aa fiebrigii is often found in Andean habitats at high elevations. The classification of Aa fiebrigii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchids.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress.
